headline: The Magnificent Seven Fell 40% While the S&P Dropped 18%: Here’s How Much Tech Concentration You Can Actually Afford
summary: I’ve been studying portfolio concentration for years, and one stat from Schwab’s On Investing podcast keeps echoing in my head. In 2022, the Magnificent Seven fell roughly 40% while the S&P 500 dropped 18%. Our data confirms the pain: SPY shed 20% that calendar year, while Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) collapsed 64%, NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) fell 51%, ... The Magnificent Seven Fell 40% While the S&P Dropped 18%: Here’s How Much Tech Concentration You Can Actually Afford

headline: Assessing Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A) Valuation After Leadership Reaffirmation And Japan Trading House Investments
summary: Recent comments from new CEO Greg Abel reaffirming Warren Buffett’s principles, along with Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.A) lifting its holdings in Japan’s major trading houses, have put fresh focus on the stock’s role in diversified portfolios. See our latest analysis for Berkshire Hathaway. Berkshire Hathaway’s share price has recently picked up some short term momentum, with a 7 day share price return of 3.05%, while its 5 year total shareholder return of 68.90% points to meaningful long term...
